characters.appearance: A young woman in her mid-20s with a slender build and medium complexion. She has dark hair pulled back into a low ponytail or bun, with some strands framing her face. Her facial features are expressive and animated.
characters.wardrobe: A dark green oversized t-shirt with a colorful 'CAREFREE' graphic on the front, paired with light blue high-waisted baggy jeans. She wears a small, dark bracelet on her right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, confident, and engaging, using hand gestures to emphasize her points.

characters.appearance: A young man in his mid-20s with a slim build and medium complexion. He has short, dark hair styled with a fringe and wears round, yellow-tinted glasses. His facial features are attentive.
characters.wardrobe: A light beige long-sleeved t-shirt with a small button placket at the collar.
characters.demeanor: Curious and attentive, leaning forward and clasping his hands as he listens.

characters.appearance: A young man in his mid-20s with a slim build and medium complexion. He has short, dark hair and wears rectangular black-rimmed glasses. His expression is thoughtful.
characters.wardrobe: An off-white short-sleeved t-shirt with a large, prominent green '16' graphic on the front.
characters.demeanor: Initially skeptical, then intrigued and questioning.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: ನೀವು ಹೇಳ್ತಿದ್ರಿ ಅಲ್ವಾ, ಮನೇಲ್ ಕೂತು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋಕೆ ಆಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ, ಬಟ್ Supernova's AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ practice ಮಾಡಿ, ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹ್ಯಾಸ್ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ಡ್ ಸೋ ಮಚ್. [You were saying, right, that you can't learn English sitting at home, but practicing with Supernova's AI teacher, my English has improved so much.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common doubt about learning English at home.
- Introduces the solution (AI teacher) and the positive outcome (improved English).
- Establishes a confident, relatable tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Neevu helthidri alva, manel koothu English kaliyoke agalla antha, but Supernova's AI teacher jothe practice madi, my English has improved so much.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: ವೇಟ್, ಒಂದು AI ಟೀಚರ್ ನಿಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಕಲ್ಸಿತಿಯಾ? [Wait, an AI teacher taught you to speak English?]
Character C says: ಅಂಡ್ ರಿಯಲ್ ಲೈಫ್ ಸಿಚುಯೇಷನ್ಸ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ? [And in real-life situations?]
Character B says: ಇದ್ಯಾದೋ ಹೊಸ ಆಪ್... [What new app is this...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Voices the audience's skepticism through the listeners.
- Highlights the unique feature of practicing real-life situations.
- Builds curiosity for the app reveal.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Wait, ondu AI teacher nimage English maatadod kalisithiya? And real-life situations alli? Idyaade hosa app...

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ಹೌದು, ಒಂದು ಆಪ್ ಇದೆ. [Yes, there is an app.]
Character A says: Supernova. [Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff by revealing the app name.
- Confirms the solution to the problem discussed.
- Ends on a confident, clear note.
